title: Hvac management and control system
abstract: A device may grant a computing device associated with a contractor account messaging access to a heating, ventilation, and air conditioning ("HVAC") control unit. A device may receive, message data from the computing device associated with the contractor account. A device may automatically cause the message data to be displayed on a user interface of the HVAC control unit.
claims:
Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A heating, ventilation, and air conditioning ("HVAC") control unit comprising: at least one processor; and non-transitory computer-readable instructions which, when executed by the at least one processor, configure the control unit to: control operation of an HVAC system within a building unit; generate a graphical user interface, the graphical user interface comprising at least a first user interface screen configured to receive user input to control operation of the HVAC system, and a second user interface screen configured to display messaging data received from a remote server computing system; establish communication with a remote server computing system; display first message fata on at least the second user interface screen of the HVAC control unit, the first message data associated with a third party account; receive, from the remote server computing system, communication data associated with a third part}' account, wherein the third party account is configured to have messaging access to the HVAC control unit; generate second message data based at least in part on the communication data associated with the third party account; and automatically update the second user interface screen to display the second message data associated with operation of the HVAC control unit and a maintenance request selection; receive, via the second user interface, a maintenance request; and transmit the maintenance request to the remote server computing system, wherein, in response to the maintenance request, the remote server computing system is configured to automatically create a maintenance job from the maintenance request for the building unit, grant the third party account access to the maintenance job, and receive information associated with the maintenance job from the third party account. 2. The HVAC control unit of Claim 1, wherein the second message data comprises a customized message based at least in part on a location of the building unit or weather information associated with the location of the building unit. 3. The HVAC control unit of Claim 1 , wherein the second message data includes timing information; and wherein the instructions, when executed by the at least one processor, further cause, based on the timing information, display of the second message data on the second user 

interface screen within a specified timeframe, and remove the second message data from the second user interface screen of the HVAC control unit. 4. The HVAC control unit of Claim 1, wherein the third party account is configured to have remote testing access to the HVAC control unit, wherein the non-transitory computer-readable instructions further configure the at least one processor to: receive, from the remote server computing system and associated with the third party account, control instructions, wherein the control instruction are configured to cause the HVAC control unit to operate the HVAC system; and send, to the remote server computing system, operational data associated with the operation of the HVAC system. 5. The HVAC control unit of Claim 1. w herein the non-transitory computer- readable instructions further configure the at least one processor to: receive the information associated with the maintenance job to be displayed on the user interface of the HVAC control unit; and automatically update the second user interface screen to display the information associated with the maintenance job. 6. The HVAC control unit of Claim 1, the non-transitory computer-readable instructions further configure the at least one processor to: receive alert data from the remote server computing system, wherein the alert data is generated based on the operational data; and automatically cause the alert data to be displayed on a graphical user interface. 7. A computer-implemented method comprising: establishing communication with heating, ventilation, and air conditioning ("HVAC") control unit, wherein the HVAC control unit is configured to: control operation of an HVAC system w ithin a building unit, and generate a graphical user interface, the user interface comprising at least a first user interface screen configured to receive user input to control operation of the HVAC system, and a second user interface screen configured to display messaging data received from a remote server computing system; automatically update the second user interface screen to display the second message data associated with operation of the HVAC control unit and a maintenance request selection; 

 receive, via the second user interface, a maintenance request; and transmit the maintenance request to the remote server computing system; in response to receiving a maintenance request, automatically creating any maintenance job from the maintenance request for the building unit; granting a third party account access to the maintenance job; receiving information associated with the maintenance job from the third party account; and transmitting, to the HVAC control unit, communication data associated with the maintenance job. 8. The computer-implemented method of Claim 7, wherein the second message data comprises a customized message based at least in part on a location of the building unit or weather information associated with the location of the building unit. 9. The computer-implemented method of Claim 7, wherein the second message data includes timing information; and wherein the communication data is configured to further cause the HVAC control unit to, based on the timing information, display the second message data on the second user interface screen within a specified timeframe, and remove the second message data from the second user interface screen of the HVAC control unit. 10. The computer-implemented method of Claim 7, wherein the third party account is configured to have remote testing access to the HVAC control unit, and wherein the computer- implemented method further comprises: transmitting, to the HVAC control unit, control instructions associated with the third party account, wherein the control instruction are configured to cause the HVAC control unit to operate the HVAC system; and receiving, from the HVAC control unit, operational data associated with the operation of the HVAC system. 11. The computer-implemented method of Claim 7, further comprising: causing the information associated with the maintenance job to be displayed on the user interface of the HVAC control unit. 12. The computer-implemented method of Claim 7, further comprising: generating alert data based on the operational data; and automatically causing the alert data to be displayed on the graphical user interface screen. 13. Non -transitory computer storage media storing instructions that when executed by a system of at least one processor, cause the at least one processor to perform operations comprising: controlling operation of a heating, ventilation, and air conditioning ("HVAC") system within a building unit; generating a graphical user interface, the user interface comprising at least a first user interface screen configured to receive user input to control operation of the HVAC system, and a second user interface screen configured to display messaging data received from your remote server computing system, and a third user interface configured to display a maintenance request selection; displaying first message data on at least the second user interface screen of the HVAC control unit, the first message data associated with the third party account; establishing communication with a remote server computing system; receiving, from the remote server computing system, communication data associated with the third party account, wherein the third party account is configured to have messaging access to an HVAC control unit; generating second message data based at least in part on the communication data associated with the third party account; automatically updating the second user interface screen to display the second message data associated with operation of the HVAC control unit and a maintenance request selection; receiving via the third user interface, a maintenance request; and transmitting the maintenance request to the remote server computing system, wherein in response to the maintenance request, the remote server computing system is configured to automatically create a maintenance job from the maintenance request for the building unit, grant the third party account access to the maintenance job, and receive information associated with the maintenance job from the third party account. 14. The non-transitory computer storage media of Claim 13, wherein the second message data comprises a customized message based at least in part on a location of the building unit or weather information associated with the location of the building unit. 15. The non-transitory computer storage media of Claim 13, wherein the second message data includes timing information; and wherein the instructions are further configured to cause, based on the timing information, the at least one processor to perform operations comprising: displaying the second message data on the second user interface screen within a specified timeframe, and 

 removing the second message data from the second user interface screen of the HVAC control unit. 16. The non-transitory computer storage media of Claim 13, wherein the third party account is configured to have remote testing access to the HVAC control unit, and wherein the instructions are further configured to cause the at least one processor to perform operations comprising: receiving, from the remote server computing system and associated with the third party account, control instructions, wherein the control instruction are configured to cause the HVAC control unit to operate the HVAC system; and sending, to the remote server computing system, operational data associated with the operation of the HVAC system. 17. The non-transitory computer storage media of Claim 13, wherein the instructions are further configured to cause the at least one processor to perform operations comprising: receiving the information associated with the maintenance job to be displayed on the user interface of the HVAC control unit; and automatically updating the second user interface screen to display information associated with the maintenance job. 18. The non-transitory computer storage media of Claim 13. wherein the instructions are further configured to cause the at least one processor to perform operations comprising: receiving alert data from the remote server computing system, wherein the alert data is generated based on the operational data; and automatically calling the alerted to be displayed on the graphical user interface. 19. The HVAC control unit of Claim 6, wherein the maintenance request selection is automatically generated in response to the operational data associated with operation of the HVAC system and the alert data. 20. The computer-implemented method of Claim 12 further comprising automatically determining the status of an HVAC system based on the operational data using one or more machine learning models.
